content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to rank unvisited memory traces by the prediction error metrics that power intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) and random network distillation (RND), turning a static memory storage into a self-sampling curiosity reservoir that automatically prioritizes high-information memory for relearning. This creates a closed loop where memory uncovers the agent’s own knowledge gaps, and curiosity-driven exploration fills those gaps to expand memory capacity.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
